name: Chicken Sauce Piquant
recipeInstructions:
1. The bacon drippings are used for browning the chicken.
2. Cut the 20 lbs of baking hens into 2-inch-long pieces.
3. Add mushrooms, onions, bell pepper, green onions, celery, parsley, and garlic to the roux and sauté until onions are tender and clear.
4. Stir in water to form a smooth paste.
5. Add tomato sauce, Chablis wine, stuffed olives, Lea & Perrins, Louisiana hot sauce, garlic, mint, and salt. Mix well.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 4 to 6 hours.
7. Cook the sauce over spaghetti. Serves 20–40 people. Freeze leftovers.
